message: If airport country has no Block F jurisdiction mapping, border-control confidence must be capped.
Special cargo with unknown import-permit status cannot be treated as customs-ready.
CITES-sensitive cargo requires species check and permit screening.
EU SPS cargo requires TRACES/CHED/certificate validation before readiness.
US biological/infectious cargo needs CDC/APHIS/CBP permit screening.
Tunisia category-specific public data is weak; manual authority validation is required.
Block F is advisory; final customs/border authority or broker validation is required for production.
